moment: I was thinking about those cakes. I wanted to make it that dinner party. The small ones with three layers that Evan made me not make, and then they were having a cake decorating party that Sweet Lady Jane, decorating those exact kind of cakes.
concept: a tiny three-layer cake inside a thought cloud, and the same three-layer cake plain beside it with a piping bag

moment: I came to the conclusion that Sandy Greenberg must have been really smart, and then it turned out Mommy had been talking about that with Sandra and Cory at the party in New York.
concept: a lightbulb inside a thought cloud and the same lightbulb inside a speech bubble, side by side

moment: I saw an owl on the fence between my house and Peron's, and I had been thinking about all the recent owl sightings earlier that day.
concept: a small owl inside a thought cloud, and the same owl perched on a fence rail beside it

moment: Sandy called in the one minute while I had my phone off airplane mode to download a photo off Instagram.
concept: a phone with a tiny airplane lifting off its corner while ring waves arrive at the phone

moment: Daddy told me his story about writing an essay thinking someone's features in a short story were describing England.
concept: one wobbly outline drawn twice side by side, once with an eye as a face profile and once with a tiny flag as an island

moment: The girl at Sweet Lady Jane gave me a weird looking piece and I said it was body positivity cause she gave me extra.
concept: a slice of pie vaguely shaped like a curvy woman's body, with a small heart drawn on it

moment: I ate my pie next to friends who seemed to be arguing — but actually one was comforting the other.
concept: two overlapping speech bubbles whose overlapping area forms a heart

moment: This really pretty girl was waiting on the couch looking sour. Then a snarky looking boy pulled up in a nice new black truck. Of course it was her ride.
concept: a small pickup truck with a sour lemon riding in the front seat

moment: It was hard to believe someone would leave a timer on for so long, and then I realized I had set it.
concept: a ringing kitchen timer with an arrow looping back around to point at its own dial

moment: I got caught robbing a bank.
concept: a money bag behind three jail bars

moment: I met a girl in the crosswalk and we became friends.
concept: two shoes meeting toe to toe on crosswalk stripes

moment: The cookie crumbs were for looking around in bed, and then I found the poem to go with it.
concept: a dotted trail of cookie crumbs leading to a small folded page of writing

moment: I kept seeing the same short girl in different places, trying on clothes.
concept: the same little dress on a hanger drawn three times in a row with a small x3

moment: I got two samples from Pinkberry.
concept: a tiny frozen yogurt sample cup with a small x2

moment: I got my app to work.
concept: a phone with a tiny victory flag raised from its top edge

moment: I figured out how to do the thing with my mind.
concept: a brain with a small switch on it, flipped ON
